mapper.select: SELECT b.bom_code, i.name, i.item_status, i.code, b.required_qty, b.bom_status, TO_CHAR(b.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at, b.bom_num FROM bom b JOIN item i ON b.item_num = i.item_num WHERE i.TYPE IN ('PRODUCT', 'SEMIPRODUCT') ORDER BY b.bom_num DESC

SELECT b.bom_code, i.name, i.item_status, i.code, b.required_qty, b.bom_status, TO_CHAR(b.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at, b.bom_num FROM bom b JOIN item i ON b.item_num = i.item_num
where 1 = 1
AND upper(i.type) = 'PRODUCT'
AND upper(i.type) = 'SEMIPRODUCT'
AND ( upper(i.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') OR upper(b.bom_code) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%') )
AND upper(b.bom_status) = 'Y'
AND upper(b.bom_status) = 'N'
AND b.created_at >= TO_DATE(#{sDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND b.created_at < TO_DATE(#{eDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND b.created_at < SYSDATE + 1
ORDER BY b.bom_num DESC

SELECT i.CODE, i.NAME, i.TYPE, i.UNIT, i.iTEM_NUM FROM item i LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM ITEM MINUS SELECT ITEM_NUM FROM STOCK ) num ON i.item_num = num.item_num WHERE UPPER(NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{_parameter}) || '%'

SELECT s.stock_id, s.stock_qty, i.code, i.name, i.type, i.unit, i.safe, i.item_status, f.facility_name, l.lot_code, l.expiry_date, l.lot_date FROM stock s JOIN item i ON s.item_num = i.item_num JOIN facility f ON f.facility_num = s.facility_num JOIN LOT l ON l.item_num = i.item_num where i.item_status = 'A' AND s.stock_id = #{stock_id}
